scope: Contiguous numeric appid band boundary summary for the two Tencent Video main interfaces in the anonymous direct-call scope.

api1.current_best_reading: Within this tested contiguous band, the canonical appid is an isolated success point; one side or both sides around it collapse into a contiguous appkey-error family, while the farther-out tested values sit on appid-no-find.

api2.current_best_reading: Within this tested contiguous band, the canonical appid is an isolated success point; one side or both sides around it collapse into a contiguous appkey-error family, while the farther-out tested values sit on appid-no-find.
